course.title: Английский для беглой речи
course.subtitle: Тренажёр беглой английской речи для русскоговорящих
course.heroLede: Короткие, ёмкие тренировки на основе метода интенсивного повторения предложений — от первых фраз до свободной, естественной речи.

lessons.title: To Be
lessons.description: I am, you are, he is

exercises.en: My father works at a bank.
My grandfather is old but strong.
Do you have a big family?
How many children do you have?
The whole family gathered at the table.
There are three windows in the room.
There are twenty-five students in the class.
I live on the fifth floor.
The meeting starts at seven o'clock.
The book costs one thousand tenge.
There are only four chairs here.
I need a bit more time.
I get up at seven in the morning.

exercises.ru: Она едет на работу на автобусе.
exercises.en: She goes to work by bus.

exercises.ru: Он работает с девяти до пяти.
exercises.en: He works from nine to five.
I come home in the evening.
He reads a book every evening.
I go to bed at eleven.
She takes a shower in the morning.

exercises.ru: Мы гуляем в парке по выходным.
exercises.en: We walk in the park on weekends.
I check my email every morning.

exercises.ru: Он занимается спортом три раза в неделю.
exercises.en: He exercises three times a week.
I clean the apartment on Saturdays.

exercises.ru: Мы ходим в магазин по средам.
exercises.en: We go to the shop on Wednesdays.

lessons.title: Food & Drink
lessons.description: Ordering food and talking about meals

exercises.en: Can I have a coffee, please?
There is milk in the fridge.
Do you want some more rice?
My phone is on the table.
The chair is by the window.
The book is on the shelf.
The clock is on the wall.
The umbrella is by the door.

lessons.title: Weather & Time
lessons.description: Talking about the weather and telling time

exercises.en: It is very cold in winter.
We will arrive in an hour.
Take an umbrella, it might rain.
Do you want to come with us?
He doesn't like getting up early.
I like walking in the evenings.
The shop is near my house.
The hospital is in the city center.
The school is far from here.
The bank is open until six.
The restaurant is around the corner.
The library is closed on Sundays.
The park is very beautiful in spring.
The airport is far from the center.
The train station is near the hotel.
The cafe is on the first floor.
The university is on this street.
The pharmacy is open twenty-four hours.
How do I get to the museum?
The theater is across from the park.
The market opens early in the morning.
My office is on the tenth floor.
The gym is near my house.
The cinema is in the new shopping mall.
The hotel is right on the seashore.
What are you doing this weekend?
Would you like a cup of coffee?

lessons.title: Past Simple
lessons.description: Talking about yesterday and last week

exercises.en: She called me in the morning.

exercises.ru: Он сломал ногу в прошлом месяце.
exercises.en: He broke his leg last month.

exercises.ru: Она была очень занята на прошлой неделе.
exercises.en: She was very busy last week.

exercises.ru: Мы жили в Москве три года.
exercises.en: We lived in Moscow for three years.
He didn't tell me the truth.
They built this house a long time ago.
Have you ever been to London?

exercises.ru: Мы собираемся переехать в другой город.
exercises.en: We are going to move to another city.

exercises.ru: Она поступит в университет в этом году.
exercises.en: She is going to enter university this year.
I think it will rain tomorrow.
We are getting married in June.
I promise I will help you.

exercises.ru: Что ты будешь делать на выходных?
exercises.en: What are you going to do this weekend?
I am going to start a new job.

exercises.ru: Они переедут в новую квартиру в июле.
exercises.en: They will move into a new apartment in July.

exercises.ru: Мы не будем опаздывать в следующий раз.
exercises.en: We won't be late next time.

exercises.ru: Через год я буду говорить свободно.
exercises.en: In a year I will speak fluently.
She is going to study medicine.
We will meet at seven in the evening.
I'm not sure I will make it in time.
The company is planning to open a new office.
We will definitely come back here.

exercises.ru: Она точно поможет тебе с этим.
exercises.en: She will definitely help you with this.
You must submit the report today.

exercises.ru: Мы не можем опаздывать на встречу.
exercises.en: We can't be late for the meeting.
You need to book in advance.
I had to work on Saturday.
You don't have to answer now.

exercises.ru: Я не могу найти свой паспорт.

exercises.en: He had to cancel his trip.
We need to talk about this.

exercises.ru: Я должен был предупредить тебя раньше.
exercises.en: I should have warned you earlier.

exercises.ru: Она могла бы стать отличным врачом.
exercises.en: She could become a great doctor.
Allow me to explain the situation.
You are required to follow the rules.
This house is bigger than that one.
She is smarter than her brother.

exercises.ru: Это самый вкусный торт, который я пробовал.
exercises.en: This is the tastiest cake I've ever tried.
He is the tallest in the class.
This task is more difficult than it seems.

exercises.ru: Мой брат моложе меня на два года.
exercises.en: My brother is two years younger than me.
This is the best solution possible.
The bus is slower than the train.

exercises.ru: Это самый дорогой ресторан в городе.
exercises.en: This is the most expensive restaurant in the city.
My new apartment is more comfortable than the old one.
He speaks English better than me.

exercises.ru: Это был худший день в моей жизни.
exercises.en: It was the worst day of my life.

exercises.ru: Чем больше я практикуюсь, тем увереннее себя чувствую.
exercises.en: The more I practice, the more confident I feel.

exercises.ru: Эта модель менее популярна, чем предыдущая.
exercises.en: This model is less popular than the previous one.

exercises.ru: У неё самый красивый почерк, который я видел.
exercises.en: She has the most beautiful handwriting I've seen.

exercises.ru: Погода становится теплее с каждым днём.
exercises.en: The weather is getting warmer every day.

exercises.ru: Он самый опытный сотрудник в компании.
exercises.en: He is the most experienced employee in the company.

exercises.ru: Это гораздо проще, чем я думал.
exercises.en: This is much easier than I thought.

lessons.title: Travel
lessons.description: Getting around and asking for directions

exercises.en: How do I get to the airport?
Where is the nearest metro station?

exercises.ru: Мне нужно забронировать номер в отеле.
exercises.en: I need to book a hotel room.

exercises.ru: Наш рейс задерживается на два часа.
exercises.en: Our flight is delayed by two hours.
Where can I exchange currency here?

exercises.ru: У меня есть только ручная кладь.

exercises.en: Turn left at the next intersection.

exercises.ru: Сколько стоит билет в одну сторону?
exercises.en: How much is a one-way ticket?
We got lost in an unfamiliar city.
The visa takes about a week to process.

exercises.ru: Мой багаж не прибыл вместе со мной.
exercises.en: My luggage didn't arrive with me.

exercises.ru: Мы забронировали столик на восемь вечера.
exercises.en: We booked a table for eight in the evening.

exercises.ru: Такси будет ждать нас у входа.
exercises.en: The taxi will be waiting for us at the entrance.
The tour starts at ten in the morning.

exercises.ru: Не забудь взять с собой зарядное устройство.
exercises.en: Don't forget to take your charger with you.
The guide knew the city's history very well.

exercises.ru: Отсюда открывается прекрасный вид на море.
exercises.en: There is a beautiful view of the sea from here.
We barely made our connecting flight.
I need to make a doctor's appointment.

exercises.ru: Он сломал руку во время футбола.
exercises.en: He broke his arm playing football.
You need to drink more water.

exercises.ru: У него болит горло и кашель.
exercises.en: He has a sore throat and a cough.
I need to get checked by a dentist.
She is recovering quickly after the surgery.
The doctor advised me to sleep more.

exercises.ru: Она чувствует себя намного лучше сейчас.
У них закончилось лекарство в аптеке.
exercises.en: The pharmacy ran out of the medicine.

exercises.ru: Мне нужен отдых после этой недели.
exercises.en: I need some rest after this week.

exercises.ru: У вас есть это в другом размере?
exercises.en: Do you have this in another size?
Can I try on this jacket?
This is too expensive for me.
Do you have any discounts right now?
I want to return this item.
The store closes in an hour.
This pair of shoes is very comfortable.
They have a great selection of clothes.

exercises.ru: Я жду распродажу, чтобы купить пальто.
exercises.en: I'm waiting for a sale to buy a coat.
This bag is worth the money.
I forgot the shopping list at home.
A line formed at the checkout.

exercises.ru: Могу я обменять это на другой размер?
exercises.en: Can I exchange this for a different size?
What do you do for a living?

exercises.ru: Я работаю бухгалтером в крупной компании.
exercises.en: I work as an accountant at a large company.

exercises.ru: У меня встреча в десять утра.
exercises.en: I have a meeting at ten in the morning.

exercises.ru: Мы работаем удалённо два дня в неделю.
exercises.en: We work remotely two days a week.

exercises.ru: Она получила повышение в прошлом месяце.
exercises.en: She got a promotion last month.

exercises.ru: Мне нужно закончить проект к пятнице.
exercises.en: I need to finish the project by Friday.

exercises.ru: Я подал заявление на новую должность.
exercises.en: I applied for a new position.
We have a flexible work schedule.
Colleagues help each other a lot.

exercises.ru: Я беру отпуск на следующей неделе.
exercises.en: I'm taking a vacation next week.
The salary was raised this year.
We have an important presentation tomorrow.
Work takes up a lot of time.

exercises.ru: Я ищу работу поближе к дому.
exercises.en: I'm looking for a job closer to home.
The meeting dragged on for two hours.
The deadline was moved to Monday.

exercises.ru: Чем ты любишь заниматься в свободное время?
exercises.en: What do you like to do in your free time?

exercises.ru: По выходным я хожу в спортзал.
exercises.en: On weekends I go to the gym.

exercises.ru: Она играет в теннис каждую неделю.
Мы любим ходить в походы летом.
exercises.en: We love going hiking in summer.
He is learning to play the guitar.
She paints with watercolors in the evenings.

exercises.ru: Мы часто ходим на рыбалку с отцом.
exercises.en: We often go fishing with dad.

exercises.ru: Я стараюсь читать хотя бы одну книгу в месяц.
exercises.en: I try to read at least one book a month.

exercises.ru: Она берёт уроки танцев по вторникам.
exercises.en: She takes dance lessons on Tuesdays.

exercises.ru: Мы любим играть в настольные игры вечером.
exercises.en: We love playing board games in the evening.
He's into coding in his spare time.
I like knitting on winter evenings.

exercises.ru: Она пишет короткие рассказы для себя.
exercises.en: She writes short stories for herself.
My friend is a very friendly person.
She is always honest with me.
He is a bit shy at first.
She is very patient with children.

exercises.ru: Она носит очки и улыбается очень часто.
exercises.en: She wears glasses and smiles very often.
He looks younger than his age.
She is very responsible at work.
He has a loud, confident voice.

exercises.ru: Она немного похожа на свою мать.
exercises.en: She looks a bit like her mother.
He is always ready to help others.
She has a great sense of humor.

exercises.ru: Он среднего роста и крепкого телосложения.
exercises.en: He is of average height and sturdy build.
She is a very organized person.

exercises.ru: У неё мягкий и спокойный характер.
exercises.en: She has a gentle and calm character.
Can I speak to Anna, please?
Sorry, I can't hear you well.

exercises.ru: Не могли бы вы говорить медленнее?

exercises.en: I'll call you back in an hour.
The line is busy, try again later.
Leave a message after the beep.
Sorry, I dialed the wrong number.

exercises.ru: Он не отвечает на звонки весь день.
exercises.en: He hasn't answered calls all day.
Let's continue the conversation on video call.
The connection is very bad today.

exercises.ru: Я отправлю тебе сообщение с деталями.
exercises.en: I'll send you a message with the details.
She missed three calls in the morning.

exercises.ru: Подожди секунду, мне звонят по другой линии.
exercises.en: Hold on a second, I have another call.
Thanks for calling back so quickly.
I forgot to charge my phone yesterday.
We agreed to call each other tomorrow morning.

exercises.ru: Он говорит очень тихо по телефону.
exercises.en: He speaks very quietly on the phone.
I think this is a great idea.
In my opinion, he is right.

exercises.ru: Я не согласен с этим утверждением.
По-моему, это не самый лучший вариант.
exercises.en: I don't think this is the best option.

exercises.ru: Мне кажется, тут есть другая точка зрения.
exercises.en: I think there's another point of view here.

exercises.ru: Честно говоря, я в этом не уверен.
exercises.en: Honestly, I'm not sure about this.

exercises.ru: Я считаю, что нужно попробовать ещё раз.
exercises.en: I believe we should try again.

exercises.ru: С одной стороны, это удобно, с другой — дорого.
exercises.en: On the one hand it's convenient, on the other it's expensive.
I see it a bit differently.
It's hard for me to agree with this.

exercises.ru: Я думаю, стоит рассмотреть другие варианты.
exercises.en: I think we should consider other options.

exercises.ru: В целом, я поддерживаю это решение.
Мне всё равно, какой вариант мы выберем.
exercises.en: I don't mind which option we choose.

exercises.ru: Я изменил своё мнение после разговора с ней.
exercises.en: I changed my mind after talking to her.

exercises.ru: Это спорный вопрос, у всех разные мнения.
exercises.en: It's a controversial issue, everyone has different opinions.

exercises.ru: Я бы хотел услышать твоё мнение об этом.
exercises.en: I would like to hear your opinion on this.

exercises.ru: Мы должны уважать мнения друг друга.
exercises.en: We should respect each other's opinions.

exercises.ru: В конце концов, решение осталось за ней.
exercises.en: In the end, the decision was hers.
